name: Tex-Mex Strata
recipeIngredient: 6 oz Red peppers, roasted and chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium skillet, sauté the sausage for 10 minutes or until lightly browned. Allow it to cool slightly. Cut into thin slices and transfer to a bowl.
2. Add the roasted red peppers to the bowl with the sausage slices. Toss gently to combine.
3. Preheat the oven to 350°F (175°C).
4. Generously grease a shallow baking dish that holds about 2 quarts.
5. Place the bread quarters in the prepared dish, reserving some for topping later. Sprinkle the cheese evenly over the bread and then add the sausage and pepper mixture on top of it.
6. Arrange the reserved bread slices on the surface to create a crust.
7. In a medium bowl, beat together the eggs, milk, chili powder, and salt until well mixed.
8. Pour the egg mixture evenly over the bread in the dish.
9. Bake for 1 hour or until the center is set. Allow it to stand for about 10 minutes before serving.
10. Makes 6 servings.
